title: U.S. and Iran Reach Framework for Peace - The New York Times
description: Trump’s post aligned with what American and Iranian officials had previously said an initial agreement might contain. The deal would include a 60-day cease-fire, the officials said. Each side sought to portray the agreement as a diplomatic victory after nearly four months of war.

title: June 14: PA’s Abbas says presidential elections to be held in 2027 | The Times of Israel
description: Signing to be held Friday in Switzerland * Trump calls Netanyahu 'very difficult guy,' says attacks on Iran could resume if nuclear deal not reached * Announcements come after Iran was said to be incentivized not to attack Israel in response to Beirut strikes

title: Trump says Israeli strike on Lebanon should not have happened, but Iran deal close | Reuters
description: A framework deal between the U.S. and Iran to end their war remains close, Trump said, after an Iranian negotiator said the attack showed the U.S. lacked the will or ability to fulfil its commitments.

title: Iran war updates: US, Tehran confirm ‘peace deal’, signing set for Friday | US-Israel war on Iran News | Al Jazeera
description: These were the updates from the US-Israel's war on Iran on Sunday, June 14, 2026.
